description: A full-width underline tab bar for switching between content sections on the same screen. Tabs fill the available width equally. One tab is always active.

parts.description: The outer container. Full-width, carries the bottom divider line and horizontal padding. No background in DS Core; product apps may add a surface background.
The currently selected tab. Has a 2px dark bottom border as the active indicator. Text or icon is rendered in the active color.
Any unselected tab. No bottom border. Text or icon is rendered in the inactive muted color.

textOnly.description: Tab item shows a text label only. No icon.

iconOnly.description: Tab item shows a 24×24 icon only. No text label.

iconAndText.description: TODO: Confirm whether a combined icon + label configuration is supported.

states.name: Active
states.description: Currently selected tab. 2px bottom border indicator. Text/icon in active dark color.

states.name: Inactive
states.description: Unselected tab. No bottom border. Text/icon in muted color.

behavior.selectionModel: Single — exactly one tab active at all times.
behavior.tabWidth: Equal — each tab takes flex: 1 of the bar width.
behavior.contentPanel: Tabs control which content panel is visible. Panel rendering is managed by the parent screen.
behavior.keyboard: TODO: Confirm arrow-key navigation between tabs.

notes: DS Core uses slash-notation tokens (--tab/border-active). Driver App uses hyphen tokens with a typo in 'inactive' (--tab-border-inative, --tab-text-inative). Alignment needed.
Inactive text color differs between DS Core (#636377) and Driver App (#9192af). Confirm intended value.
Driver App adds a surface background (--bg-surface-default / #f1f2f4) to the tab bar container; DS Core has no background. Confirm intended behavior.
Track bottom border token: DS Core uses --notification/border-default; Customer App uses --notification/border-default; Driver App uses --border-default. Same value (#e4e5ed), different token name.
Active indicator border-bottom-width uses --sds-size-stroke-focus-ring (2px). Token confirmed in Figma.
Typography: Inter Medium 500, 15px — same as Segmented Control.
TODO: Confirm whether icon + label combination per tab is supported.
